zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilmot Chudleigh於大約1506年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Richard Chudleigh13歲，母親Mary Wadham13歲。她於1530年之後與Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年6月在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿爾文頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilmot Chudleigh于大约1506年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Richard Chudleigh13岁，母亲Mary Wadham13岁。她于1530年之后与Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年6月在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿爾文頓。

variants.name: Chudley
meanings: English: locative name from Chudleigh in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Wilmot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a medieval pet form (with the Old French diminutive suffix -ot) of William .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilmot Chudleigh was born about 1506, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Richard Chudleigh, was 13 and her mother, Mary Wadham, was 13. She married Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon after 1530, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in June 1559, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Alwington, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilmot Chudleigh est née environ 1506, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Chudleigh, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Mary Wadham, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon après 1530, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1559, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Alwington, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilmot Chudleigh um 1506 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Chudleigh 13 und ihre Mutter Mary Wadham 13. Sie hat nach 1530 in England Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1559 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Alwington, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilmot Chudleigh è nata il circa 1506 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Chudleigh, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Mary Wadham, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon dopo il 1530, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1559, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Alwington, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Wilmot Chudleighが約1506年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Chudleighは13歳，母Mary Wadhamは13歳であった。1530年以後にイギリスでRichard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年6月に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアルウィントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilmot Chudleigh(이)가 대략 1506년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Chudleigh(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Wadham(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1530년 이후 영국에서 Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 6월 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 알윙턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilmot Chudleigh nasceu aproximadamente 1506, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Chudleigh, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Mary Wadham, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon após 1530, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1559, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilmot Chudleigh родилась около 1506 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Chudleigh было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Wadham, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon после 1530 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1559 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности алвингтон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilmot Chudleigh nació aproximadamente 1506, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Chudleigh, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Mary Wadham, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon después de 1530, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en junio de 1559, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra.
